summary: The video shows a vehicle driving on a city street with multiple lanes and traffic signals. Vehicles are seen traveling in both directions. A white van passes closely alongside the recording vehicle, creating a brief moment of proximity.

events_timeline.event: A white van passes closely alongside the recording vehicle, creating a brief moment of proximity.

uncertainties: Exact speed and distance between the van and the recording vehicle are unclear due to limited temporal resolution.
Visibility of additional vehicles beyond those shown may vary.

risk_assessment.why: Minimal risk of collision due to the brief and close pass of the van.
